mapper.select: SELECT tm AS weather_tm, wd AS weather_wd, ws AS weather_ws, ta AS weather_ta, hm AS weather_hm, rn AS weather_rn FROM storage.weather ORDER BY tm DESC LIMIT 1

choose.when: SELECT target_line AS line_name, event_date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT /* 중복 카운팅 방지 */ i.incident_id, TO_CHAR(i.create_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS event_date, COALESCE( NULLIF(i.incident_line_name, ''), NULLIF(l.line_name, ''), NULLIF(i.incident_station_name, ''), '미분류' ) AS target_line FROM storage.incident i LEFT JOIN storage.local l ON TRIM(i.incident_station_name) = TRIM(l.station_name) WHERE i.create_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' ) AS sub WHERE target_line IS NOT NULL AND target_line != '' GROUP BY target_line, event_date ORDER BY event_date ASC, target_line ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT incident_line_name AS line_name, TO_CHAR(create_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS event_date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM storage.incident WHERE incident_station_id = #{station_id} AND create_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' AND incident_line_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY incident_line_name, event_date ORDER BY event_date ASC
